name: proc_creation_win_lolbin_settingsynchost
raw_query: any where (not (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*"))) and (process.parent.command_line:"*cmd.exe /c*" and process.parent.command_line:"*RoamDiag.cmd*" and process.parent.command_line:"*-outputpath*")
